ogTitle: Cashmere vs Castaways Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cashmere and Castaways Beach.
heading: Cashmere vs Castaways Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cashmere, Queensland and Castaways Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cashmere has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Castaways Beach (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cashmere or Castaways Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cashmere has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Castaways Beach scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cashmere scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Castaways Beach scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cashmere or Castaways Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cashmere has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
